rule_text: Where a bonus offer is presented, its wagering requirement must be stated in the same section as the offer, not only behind a link.
Every bonus offer must state its expiry or validity period.
Every deposit-linked bonus offer must state the minimum qualifying deposit.
The page must display a responsible-gambling notice and a minimum-age statement (18+).
Where gambling is promoted, the page must reference at least one help or self-exclusion resource.
No claims of guaranteed winnings or risk-free gambling in any wording.
Gambling must not be presented as a source of income or a solution to financial problems.
A page targeting the MLT market and promoting operators or offers must display an MLT licence reference line.
